subject: Wobbuffet, a large blue inflatable-looking Pokémon, in an expressive comedic pose outdoors
description: A large, cylindrical blue Pokémon with stubby limbs and a small black tail stands or leans with an exaggerated open-mouthed expression, eyes wide. Its posture and expression convey strong emotion — either alarm, exuberance, or protest. The background appears to be an outdoor setting with warm purple and yellow tones. The overall feel is comedic and expressive. A small shadow at the base suggests the creature's tail is concealed or tucked behind.
foreground: large blue cylindrical Pokémon with wide open mouth and expressive eyes
background: warm outdoor environment with purple and yellow tones
emotion: exaggerated alarm or protest, very expressive
